* '''Semi Finals:''''' June 25th - 26th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 2 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 8 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the Overall Standings advance to the Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' June 27th - 28th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 2 matchdays. ** 12 matches (6 each day). {{box|start|padding=1em}} ====Points Distribution==== {{Points10|toggle=false|killterm=finish}}
